Core Catalog
description: The core catalog defines the baseline capabilities, threats, and controls that apply across all cloud service categories.

title: Capability Catalogs
description: Capabilities define the functional properties a cloud service must support.

title: Threat Catalogs
description: Threat catalogs identify the security and resiliency risks relevant to each cloud service capability.

title: Control Catalogs
description: Control catalogs specify the concrete security measures that mitigate identified threats for each cloud service.
